title: FoundGroup
description: A group found in a search.

groupId.description: The ID of the group, which uniquely identifies the group across all Atlassian products. For example, *952d12c3-5b5b-4d04-bb32-44d383afc4b2*.

html.description: The group name with the matched query string highlighted with the HTML bold tag.

name.description: The name of the group. The name of a group is mutable, to reliably identify a group use ``groupId`.`
